name: Yifu Liu FRSA
location: London | Right to work in UK
bio: Started off with product design training, Yifu Liu FRSA developed a broader interest in developing the real-world applications of artificial intelligence and robotics. Currently, he is pursuing a Ph.D. Degree in Computer Science & Psychology at UCLIC, where he explores the role of chatbot and XR for sustainable behaviour adoption at UKRI Textile Circularity Centre. Meanwhile, his MSc Design Engineering graduation project was funded by InnovationRCA to develop the world-first basketball robot trainer. In his own time, he has been an acclaimed creative technologist whose practice challenges the boundaries of art, robotics, and expanded reality. His works have been exhibited at MOMA Shanghai and won widely-recognised awards such as the John L Paterson Scholarship, Innovate UK, and the Distributed Design Award.
